text_block_list.text:
I was watching some race footage with 
Stay Gold, but as the girl closed her 
eyes to ponder……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh……oh boy, I dozed off. I can't seem 
to concentrate……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hey…… Do we really have to do this today?

She seemed quite sleepy and was most 
likely tired. I should reassess her race 
schedule.
